name: hf-coding-agent-v8-production-lane
description: Production-ready parallel lane for HF coding-agent v8 research and local preflight checks.

jobs.objective: Hugging Face TRL and PEFT production training practices for Qwen coding agents
Bijective and reversible coding techniques to improve deterministic code generation reliability

jobs.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; base=Path('.'); req=[base/'config'/'model_training'/'coding-agent-qwen-full-coding-system-v8.json', base/'config'/'model_training'/'stage6_atomic_workflow_eval_contract.json', base/'config'/'model_training'/'geoseal_coding_training_manifest.json', base/'scripts'/'build_stage6_must_pass_boost.py', base/'scripts'/'build_stage6_signal_shape_boost_v12.py']; missing=[str(p) for p in req if not p.exists()]; print('preflight_ok' if not missing else 'missing_files'); [print(m) for m in missing]; sys.exit(0 if not missing else 1)"
